title: Minecraft But You can Breed mobs with items
description: you use some specific items to breed the in game mobs like sheep, cow, pig and chicken.
body:
This mod is inspired by the youtuber bionic.

In this mod you can use certain items to breed mobs like sheep, cow, pig and chicken.

There is 5 kinds of sheep, 2 kinds of chicken, 3 kinds of pig and 3 kinds of cow.

sheep kinds:

1.Iron sheep - when sheared it drops iron ingot

2.Gold sheep - same as iron but drops gold.

3.lapis sheep - same as iron but drops lapis

4.Diamond sheep - When sheared it drops Diamonds and Randomly drop enchanted Diamond Armors and tools

5.Nehterite Sheep - same as iron but drops netherite ingot and smithing template of netherite upgrade.

cow kinds:

1.XP cow - Drops Xp when killed.

2.Obsidian Cow - Drops Obsidian when Milking.

3.Ender Cow - Drops Eye of Ender when milking and drops end portal frame when killed.

pig kinds:

1.TNT pig - replaces the block below it to tnt and also explodes when killed.

2.Golden Apple pig - drops Golden Apple and Enchanted Golden Apple randomly every 1 - 3 minutes

3.Totem pig - Drops Totem of Undying when killed.

Chicken Kinds:

1.Ender Chicken - Drops ender pearls instead of eggs.

2.Blaze Chicken - Drops Blaze rod instead of eggs.

Breeding Items:

1.Iron sheep - Iron Nugget

2.Gold Sheep - Gold Nugget

3.Lapis Sheep - Lapis Lazuli

4.Diamond Sheep - Diamond

5.Netherite Sheep - Dummy Netherite

(What is Dummy Netherite? Well, You can craft it using iron ingot and ink sac![Recipe for Dummy Netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf67db489fdb302f84105de369e4a63f3905e45.png))

6.Xp Cow - Dummy Bottle o' Enchanting (Again Use the below recipe)

![Recipe for Dummy Bottle o' Enchanting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a280d0caae170f9adbeb0ef5e5c7805dbc15254.png)

7.Obsidian Cow - Obsidian.

8.Ender Cow - Eye of Ender.

9.TNT pig - TNT

10.Totem Pig - Dummy Totem of Undying. (Once again use the below recipe)
![Recipe for Dummy Totem of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5304c5a6fa7b0168878d0d6b3a2e53492f8e04eb.png)

11.Golden Applde Pig - Golden Apple.

12.Ender Chicken - Ender Pearl.

13.Blaze Chicken - Blaze Powder.
